reviews.title: Unique speaker box!
reviews.text: Great sound from a tiny box! Great price combines with a unique design.

reviews.title: Nice collectible
reviews.text: I got this as a stocking stuffer. It works well for what it is. I wish that the attached auxiliary cable was a bit longer.

It was a right size for portable Bluetooth speaker. I use it conveniently anywhere I want to. 

Great item to own...

reviews.title: Works good enough
reviews.text: It was extremely cheap and cute so I couldn't pass it up it works the way I would expect something at such low cost to.
reviews.author: POESiDON

reviews.title: Good collector item
reviews.text: Good little speaker. For how tiny it is though I would think that it would have come with its own tiny aux cord. The only cords I have are over 3 feet and would look silly being hooked up to this tiny speaker. I keep it around for the Batman value.

reviews.title: Great speaker for the size
reviews.text: Compact speaker with good sound quality. Great design.

reviews.title: Speaker smaller than expected

reviews.title: Works Perfectly

reviews.title: Eh..
reviews.text: I bought it for my son but it isn't the greatest on sound. It's isn't durable either. Any bump or minor drop will turn off the speaker
reviews.author: DaGutz

reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.text: Worked good the first week, then the sound kept cutting out. Even when you could hear it, it sound very statically. You get what you pay for I guess.
reviews.author: tavo

reviews.title: Looks good!
reviews.text: cute little speaker if you are a batman fan. Does not sound very loud but still worth it for the small price if you are a batman fan.
reviews.author: Batan

reviews.title: Speaker smaller than expected
reviews.text: Got this for my daughter a lot smaller than expected.
reviews.author: Chel78

reviews.title: It's a toy...
reviews.text: It's "cute"... it plays music... perfect for an active child! Keeps them entertained and no big deal if it gets dropped, broken or lost!
reviews.author: TwistedMe

reviews.title: Misleading
reviews.text:
I'm going to give it two stars because the sound quality isn't that bad. Just wanted something for my husband to use in his office at work. It's cute... I'll give you that. 

HOWEVER, unless I (along with a lot of the other reviewers) am missing it, there is no way to recharge this.... Without rechargeable batteries and taking the batteries out to recharge them... It's all over the packaging but not a mention of recharging in the instructions. Only paid $6 so not too upset about that - just about being misled.
reviews.author: BainPartyof3

reviews.title: Great for a young child
reviews.text: This is a good speaker. Was impressed. My 4 year old son was thrilled

reviews.text: Cool Speaker For Kids and any fan of the Batman Franchise

reviews.title: Not bad
reviews.text: Great little speaker with a strong sound. Bass is on the weak side but what would you expect from a cheap speaker?

reviews.title: Can't beat the price
reviews.text: Cant beat the price for $10 when I bought it...Better sound than your phones speaker, however I couldn't stand even 5 feet away before you start to get static.

reviews.title: Too tiny
reviews.text: Very tiny speaker . Returned to store before opening because noticed that needed batteries. In my opinion not worth the buy even at the discounted price .

reviews.title: A Novelty, Nothing More

reviews.title: It was actually a gift for someone
reviews.text: They said it's working great. They have it on their desk playing while they work.

reviews.title: Great for Travel
reviews.text: I travel quite a bit and I like music when I am working or working out in my hotel room. This speaker provides great sound and music for both activities, I am getting another one as a back up!
